context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 78 validated the massive feature deployment: (1) Kelly tiers unlocked - max_order_size=25, max_signal_size=25, positions show sizes $25/$18/$12, (2) $5 tier killed - min_edge_bps=400, no $5 crypto trades, (3) Gabagool live arb - status=active, threshold=0.96, $10/side, LIVE ARB badge on frontend, (4) Weather push - weather_position_size=8, (5) Regime detector - regime_paused=false, effective_min_edge_bps=400 (not triggered yet), (6) Epoch 5 reset - Paper Balance ~$994, EPOCH 5 label visible. All shadow engines (Phantom, Shadow Sniper) still active. Gabagool is scanning but hasn't found qualifying pairs yet (needs YES+NO sum < 0.96).
